title: Silly Optimized
description: A (now primarily) Neoforge modpack made 90% for FPS and 10% for QoL
body:
# end of support
When I made this modpack, it was meant to be a Neoforge optimization pack, but as you can clearly see, there is barely any Neoforge versions and a boat load of Fabric, which just defeats the purpose of the pack. To end off the pack, I will make one final 1.21 pack as soon as possible once the version releases. If you need recommendations on optimization modpacks, use Simply Optimized, Fabulously Optimized, Adrenaline, or Additive (none of which are Neoforge, but they will update quicker than this ever did.)
## A (now primarily) Neoforge modpack made 90% for FPS and 10% QoL.
This modpack gets great FPS (at least on my PC) and also includes 2 QoL mods: Zume and WorldHost **(go support them on Modrinth!)**
### I might make a version with more QoL and Optifine features if this becomes popular.
### Use this all you want, I don't need credit but it would be nice :]
## Fabric alpha and Neoforge beta system
Due to the slow updating nature of Neoforge and its mods, I will have Fabric alphas available whenever important mods aren't available in Neoforge. Neoforge betas will be out whenever important mods are available, but not QoL mods or a couple performance mods. NOTE: alphas and betas may both run worse than full releases.
### Special Thanks to Simply Optimized, I have added their options.txt file as of alpha 1.0.0.1
